rulings.Case Title: SCARPULLA ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. JAMES R LEWY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 29, 2014, line 12. PLAINTIFF SCARPULLA ASSOCIATES' DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED. Demurer is sustained without leave to amend as to affirmative defense of laches. Northridge Hosp. v. Pic 'N" Save (1986) 187 Cal.App.3d 1088. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to other affirmative defenses addressed in demurrer to allege facts to support each defense; and to assert affirmative defenses individually or state that they are asserted by both defendants. = (501/REQ)
